.config [dir]
.config/demo [dir]
.config/demo/config -> <REPO>/demo/myprofile/config
.config/easyrice [dir]
.config/easyrice/logs [dir]
.config/easyrice/logs/easyrice.log [file]
.config/easyrice/repos [dir]
.config/easyrice/repos/default [dir]
.config/easyrice/repos/default/demo [dir]
